step_rationale: Oxidative-stress marker; glutathione conjugate indicating cardiomyocyte ischemic damage and redox imbalance.
mechanism: S-Methylglutathione reflects cardiomyocyte oxidative stress and ischemic injury during acute myocardial infarction.

references.title: Comprehensive Plasma Metabolome for Identification of Novel Biomarkers of Acute Myocardial Infarction.
